activities.title: Rewatch one episode of Beyblade Metal Fusion
activities.description: Pick a favorite Beyblade arc on YouTube and just enjoy it for 25 minutes — no pressure to do anything else.

activities.title: Solve one Easy LeetCode problem on arrays
activities.description: Open leetcode.com, pick any easy array problem, give it 30 minutes. Small win, real progress.

activities.title: Cycle to the nearest tea stall and back
activities.description: Grab the cycle, ride to the closest chai spot, drink one cutting chai, ride back. Pune evenings are perfect for this.

activities.title: Doodle five pages in a notebook to one album
activities.description: Pick one album on Spotify, doodle whatever for its duration. No skill required.

activities.title: Call a school friend you haven't spoken to since boards
activities.description: Pick one name from your 12th batch WhatsApp group, call them for 15-20 min. Surprise yourself.

activities.title: Walk for 30 minutes with phone in pocket
activities.description: Just walk. Music optional. No scrolling. Notice five things you've never noticed before in your neighbourhood.

activities.title: Read the first 20 pages of one ebook you've been meaning to start
activities.description: Open any pirated PDF you've been hoarding. Just 20 pages. You can stop after that.

activities.title: Write three pages by hand about what you actually want from college
activities.description: No filter, no judgement, just spill it on paper. Burn the pages after if you want.

activities.title: Organize one shelf in your room
activities.description: Pick one shelf, take everything off, dust it, put back only what you want there. 15 min max.

activities.title: Build a tiny one-page portfolio site
activities.description: Even just your name + a sentence + your school + one photo. Use Vercel for free. Half a day of focused work.

activities.title: Play 30 min of badminton with a sibling or neighbour
activities.description: If you have a racquet, dust it off. Even a half-broken shuttle works. Move, sweat, laugh.

activities.title: Watch one Studio Ghibli movie with no second screen
activities.description: Spirited Away, My Neighbor Totoro, anything. Phone in another room. Be a kid for two hours.
